data.title: Trump Tariffs Push EU To Hit $23 Billion In US Exports, Including Orange Juice, Poulty, And Steel From Red States
data.description: EU responds to Trump's tariffs with own strategic move targeting exports from conservative US states, adding pressure on Trump's political base.

data.title: Dow Dips Over 300 Points As US-China Trade Tensions Escalate: Apple, Tesla, Nvidia, Amazon Decline, Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
data.description: Apple, Tesla, Amazon, and Nvidia shares dropped. Walgreens reported good earnings. All sectors of S&P 500 closed in the red.

data.title: US Treasuries Defiant Run Amid Trump Tariff Turmoil Puzzles Investors— Hedge Funds Selling Or China Dumping?
data.description: Investors are baffled as U.S. Treasuries sink for the third consecutive day, and yields continue to rise across the curve, defying a long-standing market pattern during periods of stress. This is fueling speculations and concerns as the one safe haven during times of crisis now seems to be losing its luster.

data.title: US Egg Prices Fall In March After Six-Month Surge — But Still Up 75% From A Year Ago
Delta Air Lines, Kura Sushi And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: U.S. stock futures down, focus on Delta Air, Kura Sushi, Simply Good Foods earnings. Aehr Test beats estimates, Constellation Brands reports after bell.
